items.headline: Is Albemarle (ALB) One of the 10 Dividend Stocks with Low Payout Ratios and Strong Upside Potential?
items.snippet: On June 18, Citi upgraded Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) to Buy from Neutral. It kept its price target unchanged at 25. Analyst Patrick Cunningham said the company is well-positioned to benefit from structural lithium demand tailwinds. RBC Capital raised its price recommendatio

items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond electric vehicles
items.snippet: In the next two years, the distribution of lithium demand between electric vehicles and energy storage will be more balanced, said Jerome Pecresse, head of Rio Tintos aluminum and lithium business unit. Albemarle (ALB.US), the worlds largest lithium producer, noted that demand fo

items.headline: Does Albemarle Premium Valuation Justify Buying the Stock Now?
items.snippet: ALB expects lithium demand to witness a CAGR of 10-20% from 2025 to 2030. Global Energy Storage Systems production rising 117% year over year in Q1 2026. Higher lithium prices driven by strong demand from EVs and energy storage systems, along with supply disruptions due to recent

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years from mostly brownfield at Wodgina, Atacama productivity, and opportunities at its Kings Mountain and Antofalla hubs, RBC Capital Markets said. RBC now expects 2026 and 2027 EBITDA of .8 billion and .9 bil
